raw_message: Hi - I think we got billed twice for our March subscription. Could someone look into it and send me a corrected invoice?

classification.reasoning: Duplicate billing is a financial discrepancy requiring correction, but it does not block service or impact real-time operations; resolution is time-sensitive but not urgent.

extracted_info.issue_summary: Customer suspects a double charge for the March subscription and requests a corrected invoice.

customer_response: Thanks for reaching out—we understand how important it is to have accurate and transparent billing, and we’ll take a close look at your March subscription charges. Our billing team will review the transaction details and follow up with you directly regarding any adjustments or a corrected invoice. You can expect an update from us within the next few business days. We appreciate your patience and partnership—the VoiceSpin team.

internal_summary.headline: Customer reports possible duplicate March subscription charge; requests corrected invoice.
internal_summary.customer_intent: The customer wants confirmation of a duplicate March charge and issuance of a corrected invoice.
internal_summary.diagnostic_notes: Customer reports suspected double billing for March subscription; no transaction IDs, dates, or account details provided; billing category confirmed with medium priority and normal urgency.
recommended_actions: Retrieve the customer's March billing records using account ID from support ticket.
Verify all March subscription charges: amount, date, invoice number, and payment status.
Cross-check against payment gateway logs for duplicate authorization or settlement events.
Generate corrected invoice if duplication is confirmed, or draft explanatory note if not.
Send corrected invoice (or explanation) directly to customer via secure channel.
